metadata.description: Daily apologetics questions with interleaved category ordering for variety

categories.name: The Problem of Evil—God's Biggest Failure?
Is the Bible Trustworthy—Or a Mess of Errors?
Science vs. Scripture—Can't Both Be True?
The Character of God—Worthy of Worship?

questions.questionText: If everything needs a creator, who created God?

questions.categoryName: The Problem of Evil—God's Biggest Failure?
questions.questionText: If God is all-powerful and all-loving, why do innocent children get cancer?
If Jesus was God, why did He seem ignorant of things (like the date of His return)?

questions.categoryName: Is the Bible Trustworthy—Or a Mess of Errors?
questions.questionText: How can the Bible be trusted when we don't have the original manuscripts?

questions.categoryName: Science vs. Scripture—Can't Both Be True?
questions.questionText: If miracles break natural laws, doesn't that make them by definition the least likely explanation?
Why would a loving God send sincere, moral people to hell just for having the wrong beliefs?

questions.categoryName: The Character of God—Worthy of Worship?
questions.questionText: How is it "loving" to create a place of eternal torture for your own children?
Why should ancient Middle Eastern morality apply to modern life?
Why does God punish honest doubt but reward blind belief?
Am I holding the Bible to a standard I don't apply to anything else I believe?
If God is real, why does He hide instead of making Himself obvious?

questions.categoryName: The Problem of Evil—God's Biggest Failure?
questions.questionText: Why did God create a world He knew would be filled with suffering?
Why should I trust accounts written decades after Jesus supposedly lived?

questions.categoryName: Is the Bible Trustworthy—Or a Mess of Errors?
questions.questionText: Why does the Bible contain scientific errors (like a flat earth, a solid sky dome, bats as birds)?

questions.categoryName: Science vs. Scripture—Can't Both Be True?
questions.questionText: How can you take the Bible seriously when it describes the sun standing still?
Why do Christians interpret the same Bible in completely opposite ways?

questions.categoryName: The Character of God—Worthy of Worship?
questions.questionText: Why would a just God punish children for the sins of their parents to the third and fourth generation?
Why does the Bible condemn homosexuality but permit polygamy?
If I sincerely seek God and don't find Him, is that my fault or His?
What would I have to see or experience to change my mind?
Doesn't the vastness of the universe make humanity seem insignificant rather than specially created?

questions.categoryName: The Problem of Evil—God's Biggest Failure?
questions.questionText: Why does God seem to intervene in trivial matters but ignore genocides?
If Jesus is the "Prince of Peace," why did He say He came to bring a sword?

questions.categoryName: Is the Bible Trustworthy—Or a Mess of Errors?
questions.questionText: Why does the Bible include books that contradict each other theologically (James vs. Paul on faith and works)?

questions.categoryName: Science vs. Scripture—Can't Both Be True?
questions.questionText: Why does the Bible describe a global flood when there's no geological evidence for it?
How is it fair that someone's eternal destiny depends on where and when they were born?

questions.categoryName: The Character of God—Worthy of Worship?
questions.questionText: Why does God demand worship and threaten punishment for those who don't give it? Isn't that narcissism?
If morality comes from God, does that mean genocide is okay when God commands it?
If I have to suppress my reason to believe, is that really what God wants?
Am I rejecting Christianity because of evidence—or because I don't want it to be true?
Why would God create a universe with so much empty, lifeless space if Earth was the point?

questions.categoryName: The Problem of Evil—God's Biggest Failure?
questions.questionText: If free will explains evil, why didn't God create beings who freely choose good?
Couldn't the disciples have simply made up the resurrection to keep their movement alive?

questions.categoryName: Is the Bible Trustworthy—Or a Mess of Errors?
questions.questionText: Why does the Bible treat women as property?

questions.categoryName: Science vs. Scripture—Can't Both Be True?
questions.questionText: If Adam and Eve were the first humans, where did Cain's wife come from?
If Christianity is true, why are there so many denominations that can't agree on anything?

questions.categoryName: The Character of God—Worthy of Worship?
questions.questionText: Why did God send bears to maul 42 children for mocking a prophet's baldness?
Why does the Bible prescribe marrying a rape victim to her rapist?
Why do so many intelligent, educated people reject Christianity after studying it?
Have I actually read the Bible, or am I rejecting what others say it teaches?
Why do believers from every religion claim the same certainty about their God?

questions.categoryName: The Problem of Evil—God's Biggest Failure?
questions.questionText: Why does God answer prayers for parking spots but not for starving children?
Why did Jesus curse a fig tree for not having fruit out of season? Isn't that petty?

questions.categoryName: Is the Bible Trustworthy—Or a Mess of Errors?
questions.questionText: Why should I trust books written by anonymous authors with theological agendas?

questions.categoryName: Science vs. Scripture—Can't Both Be True?
questions.questionText: Doesn't the Bible's cosmology (firmament, waters above, pillars of the earth) reflect ancient ignorance?
Isn't it arrogant to claim billions of people in other religions are all wrong?

questions.categoryName: The Character of God—Worthy of Worship?
questions.questionText: Why does God test people if He already knows the outcome?
How can you use the Bible for morality when it's been used to justify atrocities?
If Christianity requires faith, isn't that an admission that there's not enough evidence?
If Christianity were true, would I be willing to follow it even if it cost me everything?
Isn't faith just believing something without evidence—and isn't that irrational?

questions.categoryName: The Problem of Evil—God's Biggest Failure?
questions.questionText: How is eternal conscious torment a just punishment for a finite life of sin?
Why would God need a blood sacrifice to forgive? Couldn't He just forgive?

questions.categoryName: Is the Bible Trustworthy—Or a Mess of Errors?
questions.questionText: Why does the Old Testament prescribe death for minor offenses like picking up sticks on the Sabbath?

questions.categoryName: Science vs. Scripture—Can't Both Be True?
questions.questionText: How can you believe the earth is 6,000 years old when all evidence points to billions?
How can you claim Christianity is the only true religion when you were probably just born into it?

questions.categoryName: The Character of God—Worthy of Worship?
questions.questionText: Why does God play favorites (loving Jacob, hating Esau before they were born)?
Why does the Bible regulate slavery instead of abolishing it?
If God exists, why is there no direct, undeniable proof?

questions.categoryName: The Problem of Evil—God's Biggest Failure?
questions.questionText: If God has a "plan," does that mean He planned for rape, murder, and torture?
Why do the Gospel accounts contradict each other on basic details?

questions.categoryName: Is the Bible Trustworthy—Or a Mess of Errors?
questions.questionText: Did God change His mind, or is the Bible just inconsistent about His character?

questions.categoryName: Science vs. Scripture—Can't Both Be True?
questions.questionText: Doesn't evolution completely disprove the Genesis creation account?
Isn't Christianity just a tool of colonialism and cultural imperialism?

questions.categoryName: The Character of God—Worthy of Worship?
questions.questionText: Why did God harden Pharaoh's heart and then punish him for having a hard heart?
Why does Paul tell slaves to obey their masters and women to be silent?
Isn't "God" just a concept humans invented to explain what they didn't understand?

questions.categoryName: The Problem of Evil—God's Biggest Failure?
questions.questionText: Why would a loving God create Satan if He knew what Satan would do?
If Jesus was sinless, why did He get baptized for repentance?

questions.categoryName: Is the Bible Trustworthy—Or a Mess of Errors?
questions.questionText: Why does Genesis 1 and Genesis 2 give different orders of creation?

questions.categoryName: Science vs. Scripture—Can't Both Be True?
questions.questionText: If God created humans, why do we have vestigial organs and "design flaws"?
If Christianity is self-evidently true, why does it require so much apologetics to defend?

questions.categoryName: The Character of God—Worthy of Worship?
questions.questionText: If God is unchanging, why does He "repent" or "regret" His decisions in Scripture?
Why do Christians cherry-pick which Old Testament laws to follow?
Why should I believe in your God and not Zeus, Thor, or any other deity?

questions.categoryName: The Problem of Evil—God's Biggest Failure?
questions.questionText: Isn't "God works in mysterious ways" just an excuse when there's no good answer?
If Jesus knew He would rise again, was His sacrifice really that significant?

questions.categoryName: Is the Bible Trustworthy—Or a Mess of Errors?
questions.questionText: How can you claim the Bible is "inerrant" when it contains obvious contradictions?

questions.categoryName: Science vs. Scripture—Can't Both Be True?
questions.questionText: Why does the Bible treat mental illness and epilepsy as demon possession?
What makes your holy book more valid than the Quran, the Vedas, or the Book of Mormon?

questions.categoryName: The Character of God—Worthy of Worship?
questions.questionText: Why did God kill Uzzah for steadying the Ark when he was trying to help?
If God is love, why did He design a world where survival depends on death and predation?

questions.categoryName: The Problem of Evil—God's Biggest Failure?
questions.questionText: How can you worship a God who stood by during the Holocaust?
Why did Jesus seem to ignore or insult non-Jews (like calling a woman a "dog")?

questions.categoryName: Is the Bible Trustworthy—Or a Mess of Errors?
questions.questionText: Why does God command genocide of entire people groups, including children?

questions.categoryName: Science vs. Scripture—Can't Both Be True?
questions.questionText: Why would God create a universe that looks exactly like it doesn't need Him to function?
If the Holy Spirit guides believers into truth, why do Spirit-filled Christians disagree on everything?

questions.categoryName: The Character of God—Worthy of Worship?
questions.questionText: Why does God accept human sacrifice in the case of Jephthah's daughter?
Why would an all-powerful God need to be worshipped?

questions.categoryName: The Problem of Evil—God's Biggest Failure?
questions.questionText: If God is sovereign, isn't He ultimately responsible for all evil?
Why should I believe Jesus existed when there's almost no contemporary evidence?

questions.categoryName: Is the Bible Trustworthy—Or a Mess of Errors?
questions.questionText: Why does the Bible endorse slavery instead of condemning it outright?
Isn't the universe better explained by science than by an invisible deity?

questions.categoryName: The Problem of Evil—God's Biggest Failure?
questions.questionText: Isn't it cruel to create people knowing most of them will end up in eternal hell?
Isn't the Jesus story just a recycled myth from older dying-and-rising gods?

questions.categoryName: Is the Bible Trustworthy—Or a Mess of Errors?
questions.questionText: Hasn't the Bible been copied and translated so many times that the original meaning is lost?
Isn't religious experience just a product of brain chemistry and psychology?

questions.categoryName: Is the Bible Trustworthy—Or a Mess of Errors?
questions.questionText: Why would God's "perfect revelation" require scholars and translators to understand it?
If God speaks to people, why do they all hear different and contradictory things?

questions.categoryName: Is the Bible Trustworthy—Or a Mess of Errors?
questions.questionText: If the Bible is God's Word, why is it so easily misunderstood and misused?
How can you claim God is "necessary" when billions live without believing in Him?

questions.categoryName: Is the Bible Trustworthy—Or a Mess of Errors?
questions.questionText: Why do Matthew and Luke give completely different genealogies for Jesus?

questions.categoryName: Is the Bible Trustworthy—Or a Mess of Errors?
questions.questionText: Why does God seem jealous, angry, and petty in the Old Testament but loving in the New?

questions.categoryName: Is the Bible Trustworthy—Or a Mess of Errors?
questions.questionText: Why do the Gospels disagree about what was written on Jesus' cross?

questions.categoryName: Is the Bible Trustworthy—Or a Mess of Errors?
questions.questionText: Why did the church get to decide which books made it into the Bible and which didn't?

christmas-eve.questionText: Why would an all-powerful God choose to enter the world as a helpless baby in a manger?

christmas-day.questionText: If Jesus is truly God, why was His birth announced to lowly shepherds instead of kings and rulers?

good-friday.questionText: Why did Jesus have to die? Couldn't an all-powerful God simply forgive sins without the cross?

easter-saturday.questionText: If Jesus knew He would rise again, was His sacrifice really a sacrifice at all?

easter-sunday.questionText: What evidence is there that Jesus actually rose from the dead, and why does it matter for salvation?

easter-monday.questionText: If Jesus conquered death, why do Christians still die? What does resurrection really promise?
